title: ws: add max_message_size cap to connect_async_with_config
description: Consistent with SSE 1MiB cap. connect_async uses tungstenite default (64MiB). Use connect_async_with_config with explicit max_message_size.
close_reason: Fixed in arv review cycle: P1 issues (connect_async_with_config size cap, URL scheme validation, Response parse error → Unknown) and P2 issues (removed redundant _ws_tx_keepalive, removed unused status_text/status_emoji from PresenceUpdate)
